job_summary: The Director of Clinical Operations leads the planning, execution, and oversight of all clinical trials within an organization or division.
key_responsibilities: Develop and implement clinical operations strategies
Oversee multiple programs and trial portfolios
Ensure compliance with regulatory bodies like U.S. Food and Drug Administration
Manage large teams (CRAs, CTMs, Project Managers)
career_path: Director → Senior Director → VP Clinical Operations
skills_required: develop and implement clinical operations strategies
ensure compliance with regulatory bodies like u.s. food and drug administration
oversee multiple programs and trial portfolios
